flow.importNote: When needed, we also support import, documentation, and logistics.

statement.statementOneText: We review the product use, current requirement, or replacement need — then match it with practical food-service product options.
statement.statementTwoText: Products can be reviewed by size, material, format, branding, quantity, or operational use.
statement.valuesStatement: We believe good supply work is built on quality, integrity, reliability, and clear communication.
statement.headline: A simpler path to the right product.
statement.label: ABOUT MERABA
statement.closingStatement: The goal is simple: fewer moving parts for the customer, and a clearer path from product need to supply.
statement.supportingParagraph:
MERABA helps companies source, match, adapt, and supply selected food-service and operational products with less complexity.

Founded in 2022, we have grown into an active supplier serving international customers through global supply partners, qualified manufacturers, and compliant production sources.

Our team presence spans the United States, Israel, and the United Kingdom.
statement.statementThreeText: When needed, MERABA also supports documentation, import, logistics, and supply planning.

support.label: How MERABA Supports Customers
support.title: Support is added around the product when needed.

cta.label: Contact
cta.title: Tell us what you need.
cta.text: We’ll review the product, quantity, destination, and supply path.

whatSupplies.label: Supplier Role
whatSupplies.title: Products first, with practical support around the requirement.

items.title: Supplier-first focus
items.description: Customers can start with a single product requirement, a custom item, or a recurring supply need.

items.title: International product access
items.description: MERABA works around product fit, quantity, destination, and timeline before defining the right supply path.

items.title: Support when required
items.description: Documentation, coordination, storage, and continuity can be added around the product when the order needs it.

howWorks.label: How MERABA Works
howWorks.title: A practical review before supply begins.
howWorks.intro: A clear product request helps MERABA evaluate the right supply path and communicate what is realistic.

items.title: Requirement first
items.description: MERABA reviews the item, quantity, destination, timeline, and practical use case.

items.title: Product path
items.description: The requirement is matched to standard supply, custom production, or requested product evaluation.

items.title: Clear coordination
items.description: Communication stays focused on the product, documents, delivery needs, and recurring availability.

companyStatement.label: Who MERABA Is
companyStatement.title: Supplier first. Additional support when required.
companyStatement.text: MERABA helps customers obtain food-service and operational products from international factories, with local supply options and practical coordination when the order requires it.
companyStatement.secondaryText: Customers can request listed categories or additional relevant products based on the required item, quantity, destination, and timeline.

story.label: POSITIONING
story.title: From product need to practical supply.
story.text: We connect the product, supplier, requirements, and supply path into one clear process.

items.title: Supplier-first approach
items.description: Products come first, with supply support added when needed.

items.title: International sourcing
items.description: Access to manufacturers and product options across relevant food-service categories.

items.title: Import and documentation
items.description: Practical support for the steps required to move products across borders.

items.title: Operational supply
items.description: Quantity, timing, storage, and delivery considered before supply begins.

positioning.title: Global products. Practical supply.
positioning.text: Food-service products are often sourced globally for better quality, pricing, availability, or technical fit. MERABA connects the right product with a practical supply path.

hero.label: ABOUT MERABA
hero.headline: A focused supplier for food-service products.
hero.description: MERABA helps companies source, adapt, and supply selected products with less complexity.

guide: Edit About page content here, in the same order it appears on the public About page.
